meta_title: VitaGLP | Metabolic Support Based on Evidence — Not Marketing
meta_description: Support your metabolism with 6 clinically-studied ingredients including Berberine, EGCG, and Chromium. 47% off + 30-day guarantee. Shipping to Austria, Switzerland, Germany, France, Sweden & Denmark.
headline: Your Metabolism Changes With Age —
headline_highlight: This Is Support That Makes Sense
hero_subtext_1: After 40, your metabolism slows by 2-3% per decade. It's not lack of discipline — it's biology. VitaGLP was formulated to support your body's natural metabolic function.
hero_subtext_2: Combines 6 clinically-studied ingredients — Berberine, EGCG from green tea, Chromium, and more — in precise dosages designed to support glucose metabolism, energy production, and appetite regulation.
benefits_headline: Your Metabolism Isn't What It Used To Be — And That's Normal
benefits_paragraphs: After age 35-40, most adults experience a natural decline in basal metabolic rate of 2-3% per decade. Insulin sensitivity decreases, cortisol levels from chronic stress promote fat storage (particularly visceral fat), and leptin resistance develops, blunting the 'I'm full' signal. This isn't a character flaw — it's documented physiology.

The result? Weight gain despite eating the same foods, stubborn fat that won't budge, constant cravings even when you've eaten enough, and energy crashes that make it hard to stay active. You know the feeling of looking in the mirror and wondering why your body isn't responding like it used to.

That's why VitaGLP takes a different approach. Instead of masking symptoms or promising unrealistic results, it addresses the underlying mechanisms: supporting glucose metabolism with Berberine, enhancing fat oxidation with EGCG, and helping regulate appetite signals with Chromium. No hype. Just ingredients that have been studied for their role in metabolic support.
urgency_text: 47% off today only. Free shipping to Austria, Switzerland, Germany, France, Sweden & Denmark.
features_headline: 6 Ingredients Selected for Their Role in Metabolic Support
features_subheadline: Each ingredient was chosen based on existing research into metabolic function — not marketing trends.

features.title: Berberine
features.description: A plant alkaloid studied for its potential role in supporting insulin sensitivity and glucose metabolism — which means more stable energy levels throughout the day and fewer blood sugar spikes that trigger cravings.

features.title: Green Tea Extract (EGCG)
features.description: Contains epigallocatechin gallate, a catechin studied for its potential to activate AMPK enzyme and support fat oxidation — which means your body may be better able to use stored fat as an energy source.

features.title: Chromium Picolinate
features.description: An essential trace mineral involved in macronutrient metabolism and blood sugar regulation — which means better control over sugar cravings and more consistent energy without the afternoon crashes.

features.title: Apple Cider Vinegar
features.description: Contains acetic acid, which has been studied for its potential role in supporting digestive health and appetite regulation — which means feeling satisfied after meals and reduced desire to snack between meals.

features.title: Vitamin B12
features.description: Essential for energy production at the cellular level and supports normal metabolic function — which means better conversion of food into usable energy, helping combat fatigue and support daily activity levels.

features.title: Ceylon Cinnamon
features.description: Contains polyphenols studied for their potential role in supporting healthy blood sugar levels and metabolic function — which means additional support for glucose metabolism alongside the other ingredients in the formula.

science_headline: How VitaGLP Supports Your Metabolic Function
science_subheadline: A three-step approach based on the ingredients' studied mechanisms of action.
science_title: From Glucose to Energy: The Metabolic Pathway

science_steps.title: Glucose Regulation:
science_steps.text: Berberine and Chromium work to support insulin sensitivity and glucose uptake at the cellular level — helping maintain stable blood sugar levels rather than the spikes and crashes that drive cravings and fat storage.

science_steps.title: Fat Oxidation Support:
science_steps.text: EGCG from green tea extract activates AMPK (AMP-activated protein kinase), an enzyme that plays a key role in cellular energy regulation — supporting the body's ability to use stored fat as fuel during daily activities.

science_steps.title: Appetite & Energy Balance:
science_steps.text: Apple cider vinegar and Vitamin B12 support digestive function and cellular energy production — helping you feel satisfied after meals while maintaining consistent energy levels throughout the day without stimulants.

science_result: The result: A formula designed to work with your body's natural metabolic processes — supporting energy, appetite regulation, and metabolic function as part of a healthy lifestyle.
shipping_subheadline: Free shipping available to all countries. Select yours to see local pricing and delivery options.
reviews_subheadline: Real feedback from verified customers across Austria, Germany, Switzerland, France, Sweden, and Denmark.

reviews.body: I've tried so many supplements over the years and was skeptical about another one. But the difference with VitaGLP is that I actually understand the mechanism — Berberine for glucose, EGCG for metabolism. It just makes sense. After 6 weeks, I've noticed I'm not constantly hungry anymore, and my energy is steady throughout the day instead of crashing at 3 PM.
reviews.name: Klaus M.

reviews.body: At 52, I had accepted that my metabolism was just 'gone.' My doctor mentioned insulin resistance might be part of the issue, so I looked for something with Berberine. VitaGLP had the ingredients I was looking for in one formula. Three months in, my clothes fit better and I have the energy to walk my dog every evening again.
reviews.name: Marie L.

reviews.body: As someone who works in healthcare, I'm very cautious about supplements. What I appreciated about VitaGLP is that they don't make wild promises — they explain what each ingredient does and let the research speak for itself. The 30-day guarantee made it low-risk to try. I've been taking it for 4 months now and genuinely feel the difference in my energy levels.
reviews.name: Anders J.

reviews.body: The appetite control is what surprised me most. I've always been a snacker, especially in the evenings. Since starting VitaGLP, I don't have that constant urge to eat. I'm still eating normally at meals, but the between-meal cravings have significantly reduced. It's made maintaining a healthy weight so much easier.
reviews.name: Sophie B.

reviews.body: I appreciate the transparency of this company. No auto-ship surprises, no fake urgency, just a straightforward product with ingredients that have actual research behind them. The shipping to Switzerland was fast and tracked. Will definitely continue using.
reviews.name: Thomas W.

reviews.body: My wife and I both started taking VitaGLP after reading about the ingredients. We're both in our late 40s and had noticed the usual metabolic slowdown. After two months, we're both sleeping better, have more consistent energy, and have each lost a few kilos without drastic diet changes. It's become part of our morning routine.
reviews.name: Erik N.

faq_headline: Everything You Need to Know Before Ordering

faq_items.question: How does VitaGLP work?
faq_items.answer: VitaGLP contains 6 ingredients that have been studied for their roles in metabolic function: Berberine for glucose metabolism, EGCG from green tea for fat oxidation support, Chromium for blood sugar regulation, Apple Cider Vinegar for appetite support, Vitamin B12 for energy production, and Ceylon Cinnamon for additional metabolic support. Together, they work to support your body's natural metabolic processes as part of a healthy lifestyle.

faq_items.question: Is VitaGLP safe?
faq_items.answer: VitaGLP is formulated with ingredients that are generally recognized as safe. It's manufactured in a GMP-certified, FDA-registered facility in the USA using non-GMO ingredients. However, as with any supplement, individual reactions can vary. If you are pregnant, nursing, taking medications, or have a medical condition, consult your healthcare provider before use. Discontinue use and consult a doctor if you experience any adverse reactions.

faq_items.question: How long until I see results?
faq_items.answer: Individual results vary based on factors like diet, activity level, and individual metabolism. Some customers report noticing changes in energy and appetite within the first 1-2 weeks. For metabolic and weight management support, we recommend consistent use for at least 8-12 weeks combined with a balanced diet and regular physical activity. Remember, sustainable changes take time.

faq_items.question: What's the 30-day guarantee?
faq_items.answer: We stand behind VitaGLP with a 30-day money-back guarantee. If you're not satisfied for any reason, simply contact our support team within 30 days of receiving your order for a full refund. No questions asked, no complicated return process. We're confident in our formula and want you to feel confident trying it risk-free.

faq_items.question: Is there a subscription?
faq_items.answer: No. VitaGLP is a one-time purchase with no subscription or auto-ship program. You order when you want, and you'll never be charged again unless you place another order yourself. We believe in earning your repeat business through product quality, not through making it difficult to cancel.

faq_items.question: How do I take VitaGLP?
faq_items.answer: Take 2 capsules daily with a meal and water. For best results, take consistently at the same time each day. Many customers find taking it with breakfast works well as part of their morning routine. Combine with a balanced diet and regular physical activity for optimal metabolic support. Do not exceed the recommended dosage.

faq_items.question: Which countries do you ship to?
faq_items.answer: We currently ship to Austria, Switzerland, Germany, France, Sweden, and Denmark. All orders include free tracked shipping. Select your country in the shipping section above to see local delivery times and proceed to checkout.

faq_items.question: Can I take VitaGLP with other medications?
faq_items.answer: If you are taking medications — especially for diabetes, blood sugar regulation, or other metabolic conditions — consult your healthcare provider before taking VitaGLP. Some ingredients, particularly Berberine, may interact with certain medications. Your doctor can advise you based on your specific health situation.

modals.title: Privacy Policy
modals.intro: Effective Date: April 1, 2026. EuroWellness Distribution GmbH ('we,' 'us,' or 'our') is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website and purchase our products.

sections.heading: 1. Information We Collect
sections.content: We collect personal information that you voluntarily provide to us when you register on our website, place an order, subscribe to our newsletter, or contact us. This may include: name, email address, postal address, phone number, payment information, and order history. We also automatically collect certain information when you visit our website, such as your IP address, browser type, device information, and browsing behavior through cookies and similar technologies.

sections.heading: 2. How We Use Your Information
sections.content: We use your information to: process and fulfill your orders, communicate with you about your orders and account, send marketing communications (with your consent), improve our website and products, prevent fraud and ensure security, and comply with legal obligations. We process your data based on your consent, contract necessity, legal obligations, and legitimate interests in improving our services.

sections.heading: 3. Cookies and Tracking Technologies
sections.content: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to enhance your browsing experience, analyze website traffic, and understand where our visitors come from. You can control cookies through your browser settings. Essential cookies cannot be disabled as they are necessary for the website to function properly.

sections.heading: 4. Information Sharing
sections.content: We do not sell your personal information. We may share your information with: service providers who assist us in operating our business (payment processors, shipping carriers, email service providers), legal authorities when required by law, and business partners in the event of a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets. All third parties are contractually obligated to protect your data.

sections.heading: 5. Data Retention
sections.content: We retain your personal information for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this policy, unless a longer retention period is required by law. Order and payment information is typically retained for 7 years for tax and accounting purposes. Marketing data is retained until you unsubscribe or request deletion.

sections.heading: 6. Data Security
sections.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. This includes SSL encryption, secure servers, and regular security assessments. However, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure.

sections.heading: 7. Your Rights (GDPR)
sections.content: If you are in the European Union, you have the right to: access your personal data, rectify inaccurate data, erase your data ('right to be forgotten'), restrict processing, data portability, object to processing, and withdraw consent. To exercise these rights, contact us at privacy@euwellness-distribution.com. We will respond within 30 days.

sections.heading: 8. Children's Privacy
sections.content: Our website and products are not intended for individuals under 18 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If we discover that a child under 18 has provided us with personal information, we will promptly delete it.

sections.heading: 9. International Transfers
sections.content: Your information may be transferred to and processed in countries outside the European Economic Area (EEA), including the United States where our servers and some service providers are located. We ensure appropriate safeguards are in place for such transfers, including Standard Contractual Clauses approved by the European Commission.

sections.heading: 10. Changes to This Policy
sections.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. The updated version will be indicated by an updated 'Effective Date' at the top of this policy. We encourage you to review this policy periodically to stay informed about how we protect your information.

sections.heading: 11. Contact Us
sections.content: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, contact us at: privacy@euwellness-distribution.com or EuroWellness Distribution GmbH, Friedrichstraße 123, 10117 Berlin, Germany.

modals.title: Returns & Refunds Policy
modals.intro: At EuroWellness Distribution GmbH, we want you to be completely satisfied with your purchase. If you're not happy with VitaGLP for any reason, our 30-day money-back guarantee has you covered.

sections.heading: 30-Day Money-Back Guarantee
sections.content: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on all VitaGLP purchases. If you are not satisfied with your purchase for any reason, you may request a full refund within 30 days of receiving your order. No questions asked. No complicated return process required.

sections.heading: How to Request a Refund
sections.content: To request a refund, simply contact our customer support team at support@euwellness-distribution.com with your order number and reason for return. We will process your refund within 5-7 business days of receiving your request. Refunds will be issued to the original payment method.

sections.heading: Return Conditions
sections.content: To be eligible for a refund: your request must be made within 30 days of receiving your order, you must provide your order number, and the product must be returned in its original packaging if requested (though for refunds under our guarantee, we often do not require physical return). Opened or partially used products are still eligible for our 30-day guarantee.

sections.heading: Refund Timeline
sections.content: Once your refund is approved, we will process it within 5-7 business days. Depending on your payment method and bank, it may take an additional 5-10 business days for the refund to appear in your account. Credit card refunds typically take longer than PayPal or other digital payment methods.

sections.heading: Damaged or Defective Items
sections.content: If your product arrives damaged or defective, please contact us immediately at support@euwellness-distribution.com with photos of the damage. We will send a replacement at no additional cost or provide a full refund, whichever you prefer. This is separate from our 30-day guarantee and applies to any defective product regardless of when discovered.

sections.heading: Non-Returnable Items
sections.content: Gift cards and downloadable products are non-refundable. Sale items marked as 'Final Sale' are also non-refundable unless defective. If you have questions about whether your item is eligible for return, please contact our support team before purchasing.

sections.heading: Shipping Costs
sections.content: For returns under our 30-day guarantee, we do not charge any restocking fees or return shipping costs. For defective or damaged items, we will provide a prepaid return label. Original shipping costs (if any) are non-refundable unless the return is due to our error.

sections.heading: Exchanges
sections.content: We currently do not offer direct exchanges. If you wish to exchange a product for a different quantity or variant, please return the original item for a refund and place a new order. This ensures faster processing and avoids inventory complications.

sections.heading: Important Note
sections.content: Our 30-day guarantee applies to first-time purchases only. We reserve the right to deny refund requests that appear to be fraudulent or abusive. We reserve the right to modify this policy at any time, but changes will not apply to orders placed before the modification date.

sections.heading: Contact for Returns
sections.content: For any questions about returns or refunds, contact our support team: Email: support@euwellness-distribution.com | Address: EuroWellness Distribution GmbH, Friedrichstraße 123, 10117 Berlin, Germany | Response time: 24-48 hours

modals.title: Contact Us
modals.intro: We're here to help. Whether you have questions about VitaGLP, need assistance with your order, or want to learn more about our products, our support team is ready to assist you.

sections.heading: Customer Support Email
sections.content: For general inquiries, product questions, and support: support@euwellness-distribution.com. We aim to respond to all emails within 24-48 hours during business days. For urgent matters, please include 'URGENT' in the subject line.

sections.heading: Response Time
sections.content: Our standard response time is 24-48 hours for email inquiries. During peak periods (holidays, promotions), response times may extend to 72 hours. We appreciate your patience and assure you that we respond to every inquiry in the order it was received.

sections.heading: Business Hours
sections.content: Our customer support team is available Monday through Friday, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM Central European Time (CET/CEST). We are closed on weekends and major German holidays. Emails sent outside business hours will be answered on the next business day.

sections.heading: Order Inquiries
sections.content: For questions about existing orders, please include your order number in your email. You can find your order number in your confirmation email. Common inquiries include: order status, shipping tracking, delivery times, and address changes (if order hasn't shipped yet).

sections.heading: Mailing Address
sections.content: EuroWellness Distribution GmbH | Friedrichstraße 123 | 10117 Berlin | Germany. Please note: This is our administrative office. We do not accept returns at this address unless specifically instructed by our support team.

sections.heading: Product Questions
sections.content: For questions about VitaGLP ingredients, dosage, or usage: Check our FAQ section first for immediate answers. If you need personalized advice, consult your healthcare provider. While we can provide general product information, we cannot give medical advice.

sections.heading: Wholesale & Partnerships
sections.content: For wholesale inquiries, partnership opportunities, or affiliate program questions: partners@euwellness-distribution.com. Please include details about your business and proposed partnership in your email.

sections.heading: Privacy Concerns
sections.content: For questions about your data, privacy, or to exercise your GDPR rights: privacy@euwellness-distribution.com. Include 'Privacy Request' in the subject line for faster routing.

sections.heading: Independent Distributor Notice
sections.content: EuroWellness Distribution GmbH is an independent authorized distributor of VitaGLP. We are not the manufacturer. For questions specifically about the manufacturing process or ingredient sourcing at the production level, we will forward your inquiry to the manufacturer on your behalf.
